_note: D3.C.3 canonical re-test example built from the user's verbatim original prompt that produced the bad CAD output. UK new-build open-plan office 10×8 m, 500 lux target, BS EN 12464-1, 6000 lm LED panels on a 600 mm modular ceiling, DALI controls, no glazed walls, drawing L-001 P1 1:50 A3. Doubles as the spec-level re-test gate AND the few-shot canonical future generators copy from.
_d5_retrofit_note: Retrofitted by D5 sprint 2026-06-04. v1.6.0 → v1.7.0: input declares NO zone_purpose_overrides — generator applies v1.7 defaults to derive Z2 task + Z3 surrounding from the room geometry (open_plan_office with 4×5 luminaire grid). Task region = room footprint inset 500 mm per BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.2.2.2 → the central 6 luminaires (L07-L09, L12-L14) land in Z2 task (em_target=500 lx from Table 5.26.1); the 14 perimeter luminaires (row 0 + row 3 + west/east columns of rows 1-2) land in Z3 surrounding (em_target=250 lx = 500 × 0.5 per ZP-02 default ratio, upper-band boundary of [0.3, 0.5]). All 20 luminaires default to mount_type='recessed' per MT-01 (matches user's verbatim 'recessed into a 600 mm modular ceiling grid'). INV-14 becomes the FIRST non-vacuous PASS across the lighting-layout example set: ratio=0.500 ∈ [0.3, 0.5]. Honest disclosure mirrored in output.calculation_summary.assumptions[], output.rationale.sections[], and reasoning.md §D5.

photometric_ies_paths._source: Synthetic 600x600mm recessed LED panel, opal diffuser, 4000K, 6000lm baseline variant. Distribution: Lambertian cos(theta) per CIBSE LG7 §6.2 typical opal panel. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3. Cascade retrofit per photometric-analysis v1.0 sprint D.2; engineer-of-record substitutes project IES before final design freeze.
